_comment: Snail Mail (2004) per-curve track-geometry RE. Static analysis + Unicorn emulation of isolated factory functions; the binary was NEVER executed as a process. Addresses are file VAs of the non-DRM build. Feeds src/track/track.js.

game_singleton.comment: The big game object; its address lives at global [0x4df944]. All the '0xff...' offsets below are members of this object (esi/ebx in the disasm).

descriptor_array.comment: Each CURVE owns a PAIR of 0xA8-byte descriptor sub-objects (the two halves selected by flag [edx+2]). 0xff29bc = 0xff2914 + 0xa8. Pair stride = 0x150.
descriptor_array.entry_count_note: 126 = 2 * 63 (registry has 63 slots, 51 named). Default-constructed empty in singleton ctor.

constructor.init_loop_code: lea edi,[esi+0xff2914]; mov ebx,0x7e; @ ecx=edi; call 0x4085e0; add edi,0xa8; dec ebx; jne
constructor.note: The ctor only ZERO-INITS the descriptors. The real per-curve VALUES are written later by the per-curve FACTORY functions (see factories[]).

selector.curve_index_source: [singleton+0x5ccb68]  (written at 0x43657e from [seg+0x844], the relocated parsed curve index)
selector.reads_model_handle_from: [descriptor+0x24]  (passed to 0x42f5b0 to install as active renderer model)

descriptor_layout_0xA8._comment: The per-curve descriptor (= the object the runtime shaper calls 'descrB', stored in the array at 0xff2914). Fields verified by reading factory writes and the shaper reads.
descriptor_layout_0xA8.+0x24: model/mesh handle (DirectX .x); installed into renderer when curve becomes active
descriptor_layout_0xA8.+0x38: CURVE INDEX (0..50). Compared by the hill-bump gate against {8,9,10,14,16,36,43,45}.
descriptor_layout_0xA8.+0x3c: byte flag (0 on fresh build; 1 on a mirror-clone copy)
descriptor_layout_0xA8.+0x44: POINT COUNT (number of control points generated)
descriptor_layout_0xA8.+0x4c: LENGTH (float; = point count for most curves)
descriptor_layout_0xA8.+0x54: saved input arg (the float SIZE/amplitude param the factory was called with)
descriptor_layout_0xA8.+0x58: ptr to PRIMARY control-point buffer (count * 0xA8 bytes)

control_point_layout.+0x00..+0x3c: 4x3 transform matrix; the +0x30/+0x34/+0x38 row is the POSITION (X,Y,Z) of this control point (the authoritative centerline)
control_point_layout.+0x90/+0x94/+0x98: raw pre-transform vec (cross-section offset before the per-point frame transform)
control_point_layout.+0xa0: PROFILE param (HALFPIPE: the U-pipe wall radius; 0 for most others)

runtime_shaper_chain._comment: How the runtime walks the descriptor during play (parent struct reached from the rider).
runtime_shaper_chain.descrA: [rider+0xc0]  = an EMBEDDED sub-struct at singleton+0x3bb764 (no vtable; interior ptr). Constructor 0x43a9a0.

descrA_fields.+0x70: current progress position along the curve (init 4.0 at 0x43ad66)
descrA_fields.+0x384: gate flag byte (==1 when a curve is active; set by installer 0x420c20)
descrA_fields.+0x388: = descrB ptr (the 0xA8 descriptor from the 0xff2914 array; = [descrC+0x38])
descrA_fields.+0x38c: = descrC ptr (per-curve record at singleton+0x3bfac8 + i*0x54, type@+0x3c, start@+0x18)

runtime_shaper_chain.descrC: per-curve record array at singleton+0x3bfac8, stride 0x54; +0x18 = segment start offset, +0x3c = type byte, +0x38 = descrB slot

master_builders.comment: Builds 64 track-segment slots at [singleton+0x1066f2c + n*0x150] by calling per-curve factories with specific args. There are sibling per-world builders for the curve types World00 doesn't use (HILL/VALLEY/SBEND/TOAD/TWISTERB families).
master_builders.mirror_clone_note: thiscall(dst,src): copies +0x38/+0x44/+0x4c/+0x50/+0x54, sets +0x3c=1, NEGATES the X column (fchs) -> a left/right mirrored copy of the previous curve.
